evidence: Settings page at /settings renders all required sections:
Company Information: Company Name (Test Agency Co), Brief (No brief set), Wallet Address, Edit Profile button
Backend Status: Connection (Connected green dot), Data Source (Live Supabase tables)
Feature Tour: Replay Tour button
Onboarding: Status 'Completed' label, Reset Onboarding button
Defaults: Company Type (agency), Brand Color
Danger Zone: Disconnect Wallet section with explanatory text and disabled button
No console errors beyond known React Router future flag warnings
PageLoadingState, PageEmptyState, PageErrorState reusable components exist in src/components/PageStateIndicators.tsx
PageLoadingState used in: Integrations.tsx, Agents.tsx, SectionPage.tsx (cockpit/settings)
PageEmptyState used in: Agents.tsx (no agents empty card)
PageErrorState used in: Integrations.tsx, Agents.tsx, SectionPage.tsx with Retry buttons
Dashboard has its own inline empty states: 'No active agents', 'No runs yet', 'No pending approvals', 'No urgent issues — all clear'
Cockpit/OrgChart have animate-pulse loading indicators
Skills page has skeleton card loading rows
All core pages (dashboard, cockpit, agents, integrations, settings) have intentional loading, empty, and recoverable error states
All 15 left-nav routes tested and loaded successfully without 404s or dead ends:
/dashboard, /cockpit, /inbox, /issues, /goals, /approvals, /projects, /agents, /org-chart, /skills, /delegations, /costs, /activity, /integrations, /settings
Each route navigated via direct URL and confirmed no 404/Not Found content
All routes reachable through the real left-nav navigation path
Mobile (375x812): Sidebar collapses, integration cards stack single-column, Settings sections stack vertically — all usable
Tablet (768x1024): Sidebar visible with labels, integration cards in 2-column grid, cockpit controls accessible
No clipped primary actions or overlapping panels at either breakpoint
Screenshots captured for integrations at mobile, settings at mobile, integrations at tablet, and cockpit at tablet
